steps.title: Identify the rate term
steps.content:
In the equation
$$0.3t+4=7$$
the variable $t$ is measured in months. The coefficient $0.3$ is multiplied by the number of months, so it represents inches per month.

steps.title: Match the context
steps.content:
The $4$ is the starting length, and the $7$ is the target length. The coefficient $0.3$ describes how many inches Maya's hair grows each month.
The answer is C.
